arts.ttl: Juventus Step Up Pursuit of Antonio Silva with Jorge Mendes’ Intervention
arts.sum: Juventus' sporting director Cristiano Giuntoli is working on multiple fronts to secure the much-needed defensive reinforcements for Thiago Motta's squad. With Feyenoord's firm rejection of any mid-season transfer for David Hancko, Giuntoli has intensified efforts to acquire Ronald Araujo from Barcelona, collaborating closely with the player's agent to negotiate a loan deal with an option to buy.
